name: viewport-lock
description: Prevent pinch / double-tap zoom on mobile while keeping scroll. iOS-aware (Safari ignores user-scalable=no).

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs && cp src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts

author: kv
